name: gpu/stats
description: Query GPU memory manager stats including VRAM detection, per-subsystem budgets (inference, TTS, rendering), usage tracking, and memory pressure. Returns real hardware data from Metal (macOS) or CUDA APIs.

params.name: subsystem
params.description: Filter to specific subsystem: 'inference', 'tts', or 'rendering'. Omit for full stats.

results.name: gpuName
results.description: GPU hardware name (e.g., 'Apple M3 Max', 'NVIDIA RTX 5090')

results.name: totalUsedMb
results.description: Total VRAM used across all subsystems in MB

results.name: reserveMb
results.description: Reserved headroom in MB (5% of total, prevents OOM)

results.name: inference
results.description: Inference subsystem budget and usage (models, LoRA adapters)

examples.expectedResult: { gpuName: 'Apple M3 Max', totalVramMb: 36864, pressure: 0.12, inference: { budgetMb: 25804, usedMb: 3200 }, ... }
{ gpuName: 'Apple M3 Max', totalVramMb: 36864, pressure: 0.12, inference: { budgetMb: 25804, usedMb: 3200 } }
